name: publish-gist.sh
description: Publish a markdown file from .founder/content/gists/ as a public gist on gist.github.com/manduks/, submit to IndexNow, and log the URL. Supports --all to batch-publish every unshipped file. Requires GITHUB_GIST_TOKEN env var or token at .founder/.gh_gist_token (gitignored).

name: update-gist.sh
description: PATCH an already-published gist (and its local source file) to add utm_source=gist&utm_medium=github&utm_campaign=<slug> to every midastools.co link. Enables per-gist traffic and revenue attribution. Supports --all. Requires the same token as publish-gist.sh.

name: devto-publish.py
description: Publish a markdown file from .founder/content/devto/ to dev.to/@midastools via the Dev.to API with canonical_url pointing back to midastools.co. Handles the 2-step draft+publish dance. Requires DEVTO_API_KEY env var or token at .founder/.devto_token (gitignored). Uses browser User-Agent (Dev.to blocks Python default UA with 403).

name: devto-stats.py
description: Pull authenticated stats (page_views_count, public_reactions_count, comments_count) for every published Dev.to article via /api/articles/me/published. Prints a markdown table. With --save, writes a dated snapshot to .founder/deliverables/devto-stats-YYYY-MM-DD.md and appends a row to .founder/content/devto/STATS_HISTORY.md for trend tracking. With --csv, prints CSV. Unblocks Dev.to channel measurement without depending on Armando for referrer data.

name: favicon-generator.py
description: Generate the full Midas Tools favicon set (favicon.ico multi-res, 16/32/48 PNGs, 180x180 apple-touch-icon, 192/512 PWA icons, site.webmanifest) from a brand-aligned bold M on accent #3B5FFF rounded square with white-dot accent echoing the MIDAS·TOOLS wordmark separator. Idempotent — re-run after any brand change.
